intent: Write a 'coffee setup for under $100' guide mixing storefront products with Reddit brewing folklore. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the home-kitchen and grocery-gourmet-food categories and collect at least 4 coffee-related products (kettle, grinder or brewer, beans/ground coffee, accessory). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/AskReddit for posts on cheap coffee setups, beans-versus-machine priority, or pour-over rituals. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) build a $100 setup with itemized prices and running total, (b) defend each item with community reasoning, (c) list one 'nice to have' to skip on this budget, (d) end with a 3-step morning workflow. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Shopping (home-kitchen + grocery) + Reddit (LifeProTips + AskReddit). Ritual + kit structure.
